summary.title: Metaverse - Lab 3
summary.description: Login, registration, and befriending processes of the Metaverse case study (Decentraland-based social platform).

threats.title: Registration impersonation
threats.description: Attacker impersonates a legitimate user during registration.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Denial of registration action
threats.description: A user could deny having submitted a registration request, complicating dispute resolution.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Registration data tampering
threats.description: Attacker manipulates the registration payload (e.g. submits someone else's email) to impersonate or hijack another user's identity.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Registration flooding
threats.description: Attacker submits large volumes of fake registration requests, degrading service availability.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Registration data intercepted in transit
threats.description: Attacker intercepts and modifies registration data (e.g. email, password) while it travels from the user's client to the backend, e.g. via a man-in-the-middle attack on an unsecured connection.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Profile data leakage
threats.description: Attacker gains unauthorized read access to the profile store, exposing personal data (name, avatar, preferences) for many users at once.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Unauthorized profile modification
threats.description: Attacker modifies another user's profile data directly, bypassing normal application controls.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Profile data exposed in internal transit
threats.description: If the internal channel between the registration process and the profile store is unencrypted or overly permissive, an attacker with internal network access could intercept personal profile data before it's stored.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Credential store breach
threats.description: Attacker gains unauthorized read access to the credential store, exposing usernames and password hashes.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Unauthorized credential modification
threats.description: Attacker modifies stored credentials directly (bypassing the registration process), potentially locking out or hijacking accounts.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Credential data exposed in internal transit
threats.description: If the internal channel between the registration process and the credential store is unencrypted or overly permissive, an attacker with internal network access could intercept credential data before it's hashed and stored.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Credential stuffing / brute-force login
threats.description: An attacker guesses or reuses leaked credentials to impersonate a legitimate user.
threats.mitigation: Rate limiting, account lockout after repeated failures, multi-factor authentication.

threats.title: Denial of login/session action
threats.description: A user could deny having logged in or performed actions during a session, complicating dispute resolution.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Login flooding
threats.description: Attacker floods the authentication endpoint with requests, degrading availability for legitimate users.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Session fixation
threats.description: The attacker pre-sets a session identifier and gains the victim's privileges once they log in using it.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Credential store breach (login verification)
threats.description: Attacker gains unauthorized read access to the credential store during the verification step, exposing password hashes.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Session token tampering
threats.description: Attacker modifies or forges session data in the store to escalate privileges or hijack another user's session.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Session creation data tampered internally
threats.description: If the internal channel between the authentication process and the session store is unencrypted or overly permissive, an attacker with internal network access could inject or modify session data as it's created.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Credential verification data exposed internally
threats.description: If the internal channel between the authentication process and the credential store is unencrypted, an attacker with internal network access could intercept credentials during verification.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Login credentials intercepted in transit
threats.description: Attacker intercepts and modifies login credentials or the returned session token while in transit, e.g. via a man-in-the-middle attack on the public network.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A
